title: Scrollrebind
description: Allows binding scrolling to a keybind. Available for Fabricmc!
body:
**REQUIRES: [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# scrollrebind

Allows binding a keybinding for the mouse wheel.

|Command|Description|
|-|-|
|/scrollrebind set <BOTH\|UP\|DOWN> <Keybinding>|Binds a keybinding to a scroll direction|
|/scrollrebind unset <BOTH\|UP\|DOWN>|Unbinds the scroll direction|
|/scrollrebind enable|Enables the mod|
|/scrollrebind disable|Disables the mod|

**Note: The hotbar scroll functionality will get disabled**

Icon has been copied from [Scroll Wheel - wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Scroll_wheel#/media/File:3-Tasten-Maus_Microsoft.jpg)
